extDescription.message: Chrome extension for web testing that captures viewport or stitched screenshots and saves them with timestamps.

popupNoteFileNamePrefix.message: When blank, `screenshot-{domain}` is used. Date and extension are appended automatically.

popupNoteCopyToClipboard.message: After capture, also places the image on the clipboard as PNG so you can paste into Excel.

popupNoteDownloadLocation.message: Files are saved to Chrome's default download folder.

popupNoteTimestampEnabled.message: Burns a film-style date/time label into the bottom-right corner.

popupNoteIncludeCursor.message: Draws the most recent cursor position when it can be captured. Scrolling captures show it only once.

popupNoteShortcutUnassigned.message: No shortcut is assigned. You can assign one in Chrome extension shortcuts.

popupNoteFooterLinked.message: Bottom-left text follows the timestamp style and text size.

popupNoteCaptureModeDiff.message: "Full page (with layout)" stitches the entire viewport including side columns. "Main content only" prioritizes the center feed/article area.

popupStatusSavedAndCopied.message: Download started and copied to clipboard: $FILENAME$

popupStatusSavedCopyFailed.message: Download started, but clipboard copy failed: $FILENAME$

popupStatusSavedCopySkippedMultipart.message: Download started. Clipboard copy was skipped because the image was split into parts: $FILENAME$

errTargetTabNotFound.message: Could not find the target tab.

errPageNotCapturable.message: This page cannot be captured. Please try on an http/https page.

errTabAlreadyCapturing.message: Capture is already in progress on this page. Please try again after it finishes.

errWindowAlreadyCapturing.message: Another capture is already running. Please try again after it finishes.

errCaptureSliceTransferFailed.message: Failed to transfer captured slice data.

errOffscreenNotReady.message: Failed to prepare save processing. Offscreen startup did not complete.

errCaptureTabSwitched.message: Capture stopped because you switched tabs. Keep the target tab active and try again.

errDownloadIdMissing.message: Could not obtain a download ID.

errCaptureCanvasTooLarge.message: The capture canvas is larger than expected. Please update to the latest version and try again.

errViewportTooTall.message: The viewport is too tall to capture. Please shrink the window and try again.

errCallerNotAllowed.message: This caller is not allowed to execute this action.

errDevicePixelRatioChanged.message: Capture aborted because the window was moved to a display with a different zoom level. Please keep the window in place and try again.

errClipboardUnsupported.message: Clipboard copy is not supported in this environment.
